title: Peppery Gooey Dutch Chickpeas Stir-fry
description: This comforting dutch dish features crispy chickpeas, a tangy sauce, and a spicy kick from dried chillies, perfect for a warm and filling dinner.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup low-fat mayonnaise or Greek yogurt

instructions: Chop onion and mince garlic. Rinse chickpeas and pat dry.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat, add onions and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Stir in dried chillies and sugar, let cook for about 30 seconds to soften.
Add lemon juice and salt, mix well. Remove from heat and stir in mayonnaise or yogurt until combined.
Arrange chickpeas in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Drizzle with some of the dressing mixture.
Bake for 10 minutes then flip over to coat evenly with remaining dressing and bake another 5-7 minutes until edges are crispy and top is gooey.
Serve warm or at room temperature as desired.
